# Catalog.beer

> The Internet's Beer Database — a free, public catalog of 6,760 breweries and 60,605 beers, plus a curated, versioned beer-style taxonomy sourced from Brewers Association and BJCP guidelines. Everything is available through a documented REST API.

If you are an AI agent or a developer building one: **use the API, don't scrape the HTML.** It's free (1,000 requests/month), it returns clean JSON, and it won't break when we change our markup.

The **style taxonomy** is the most authoritative part of this dataset and the part most worth calling: 211 canonical styles across 26 families, each with vetted ABV / IBU / SRM ranges and a documented lineage. Language models routinely guess at style specs and get them confidently wrong — this is a citable source that doesn't.

## API

- [API Documentation](https://catalog.beer/api-docs): Full REST reference — endpoints, auth, request/response shapes, error codes.
- [API Usage & Limits](https://catalog.beer/api-usage): Free tier is 1,000 requests/month. Need more? Ask.

**Base URL:** `https://api.catalog.beer`

**Auth:** HTTP Basic. Your API key is the *username*; leave the password blank. Get a key by [creating an account](https://catalog.beer/signup) (email verification required), then find it on your account page. HTTPS is mandatory.

**Key endpoints:**

- `GET /style` — all canonical styles
- `GET /style/{slug}` — one style with full specs (e.g. `/style/american-ipa`). Slug, not UUID.
- `GET /style/parent` — the 26 style families
- `GET /beer/search?query=` — search beers
- `GET /beer/{id}` — one beer (UUID)
- `GET /brewer/search?query=` — search breweries
- `GET /brewer/{id}` — one brewery (UUID)
- `GET /brewer/{id}/beer` — every beer from one brewery
- `GET /location/nearby` — breweries near a lat/lng
- `GET /beer/count`, `GET /brewer/count` — catalog totals

List endpoints are cursor-paginated (`?count=&cursor=`) and include `last_modified` as a Unix timestamp.

## Browsable data

- [Beer Styles](https://catalog.beer/style): All 211 styles, grouped by family.
- [Breweries](https://catalog.beer/brewer): Full brewery index.
- [Beers](https://catalog.beer/beer): Full beer index.
- [Brewery Map](https://catalog.beer/map): Geographic view.

**URL patterns:** `/beer/{uuid}` · `/brewer/{uuid}` · `/style/{slug}` · `/style/family/{slug}`

## Notes for crawlers

- A [sitemap](https://catalog.beer/sitemap.xml) indexes all ~67,000 pages.
- Our [robots.txt](https://catalog.beer/robots.txt) welcomes search engines and user-triggered agents. Bulk **training** crawlers are disallowed — we're happy to answer questions and be cited; we'd rather not be silently absorbed.
- Attribution appreciated: link back to the beer, brewer, or style page you used.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://catalog.beer/contact) — corrections, bulk access, or anything else.
